title: Oak's Enhancements
description: Boosted performance mods with high-quality shaders for Fabric. Designed for a refresh without removing the beauty of vanilla Minecraft.
body:
Oak's Enhancements is a **client-side modpack** focused on improving Minecraft’s performance and usability without altering core gameplay. It includes **optimization** mods to increase FPS, support for shaders, and **lightweight** tools for building, recording, and customizing your experience.

This modpack is ideal for players who want a **smoother experience**, whether playing survival, building in creative, or recording content. All included mods are client-side only, meaning you can join vanilla servers without issues.
